---
title: Headings
description: Standards for writing clear, scannable headings
---

## Heading levels

Use heading levels to create a clear hierarchy. Don't skip levels.

- **H1:** Page title (one per page)
- **H2:** Major sections
- **H3:** Subsections within H2
- **H4:** Use sparingly for deeply nested content

## Capitalization

Use sentence case for all headings. Capitalize only the first word and proper nouns.

- **Do:** Create a new project
- **Don't:** Create a New Project
